calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-06-2003 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On December 16, 2002
Off Calendar Dec-17-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Loretta Najara. Michael A. Lysobey, Esq. appeared for Plaintiff, Uecker & Associates, Inc. Default entered on October 7, 2002 against Namesafe, Inc. dba Namesafe.com. Cynthia Gray was sworn and examined on behalf of the Plaintiff. Exibit #l - Group exhibits - 7 documents in support of default prove-up was marked for identification and moved in evidence. The Court receives evidence and good cause appearing, grants judgment as follows: Principal: $460,581.56; Costs: $661.00; Interest: $70,287.83 for a total judgment of $531,530.39. Order signed in open court.

STATUS CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-29-2002 Continued To Jan-10-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
